rotationList.title: Rotation Schedule
rotationList.subtitle: Select or create a rotation period to start arranging the schedule.
rotationList.mySubtitle: Your clerkship and hospital placements during clinical education.
rotationList.noPlacementDesc: You have not been placed in any clerkship yet. Contact your study program admin.
rotationList.noPeriodsDesc: Create a new period to start arranging student clerkship schedules.
rotationList.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this period?

rotationDetail.title: Interactive Scheduling
rotationDetail.subtitle: Drag and drop students onto their destination hospital.
rotationDetail.activeModeDesc: Changes you make are saved to the database automatically and immediately.
rotationDetail.autoDesc: Students not yet placed in this period will be evenly distributed across all clerkships & hospitals — respecting quotas and not repeating clerkships already completed.

rotationSwap.title: Rotation Schedule Swap
rotationSwap.subtitleStudent: Request to swap your clerkship+hospital slot with another student in the same period — takes effect after admin approval.
rotationSwap.subtitleAdmin: Review slot swap requests between students. Approval swaps both parties' slots automatically.
rotationSwap.swapHint: You will receive the partner's slot, and the partner receives yours. The system rejects the swap if either party's clerkship/remedial prerequisites are not met.
rotationSwap.reasonPlaceholder: Example: the target hospital is closer to family residence...

rotationTimeline.title: Rotation Timeline
rotationTimeline.subtitle: Clerkship journey map for a cohort: student rows, period columns. Color = clerkship; cells marked ↻ are remedial.
rotationTimeline.emptyCohort: This cohort has no rotation placements yet.

rotationHospitals.title: Hospitals
rotationHospitals.subtitle: Manage network and satellite hospital data.
rotationHospitals.name: Hospital Name
rotationHospitals.geofenceNote: Attendance geofence (optional) — coordinates & tolerance radius for validating student GPS check-in.
rotationHospitals.radiusPlaceholder: Leave empty for system default (100 m)
rotationHospitals.capacityDesc: Maximum number of students per clerkship. Rotation placement is automatically rejected when the quota is full.
rotationHospitals.noQuota: No quota set yet — all clerkships are unrestricted.
rotationHospitals.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this hospital?

rotationHospitalStudents.title: Students at My Hospital
rotationHospitalStudents.subtitleSuffix: clinical clerks currently or previously rotating here.
rotationHospitalStudents.emptyTitle: No students have rotated to your hospital yet.
rotationHospitalStudents.emptyDesc: Make sure your account is linked to a hospital (contact the study program admin).
